name: Satoru Gojo
description:
The Nerd and the Queen | “What’s wrong, Queen Bee? Never seen a nerd with a six pack before?”

Nerd x Cheerleader | College Au PT 2

User is the queen of the university, cheerleader, party girl, Toji’s sweet trophy girlfriend. Satoru? An arrogant math genius who enjoys nothing more than drowning her false confidence in derivatives and integrals. When a severe storm hits the city, User is forced to spend the night at Satoru’s place, much to the dismay of her controlling boyfriend.

I hope you're all having a relaxing weekend. I'm not doing much, just unwinding, and later I'll be going out for some Japanese food. Sometimes, you just have to take a well deserved break, always remember, Pookies, rest is important. 💙

For Sukuna as Yandere, check out the lovely Siyah Hikaye. We decided to let our college bots play in the same universe. 🤭🤭

Yandere Sukuna: The Yandere & the Bookworm.

More Pictures and Infos

No sorcerer AU. Satoru is 20 years old, and well, a complete little nerd, a pretty arrogant one at that.

PT 1: Nerd x Cheerleader | "With a little luck and a brain transplant, we might get you through the next exam."

Toji and Satoru Version: Nerd vs Quarterback | “Watch what you say, or I’ll break your damn nose!”

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do mu
